nasb.text: and their grain offering, fine flour mixed with oil: three-tenths of an ephah for each bull, two-tenths for the one ram,

esv.text: also their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for each bull, two tenths for one ram,

cnv.text: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛要獻三公斤；為每隻公綿羊，要獻兩公斤；

ccb.text: 同时要献上调了油的细面粉作素祭，每头公牛需献三公斤素祭，每只公绵羊需献两公斤素祭，
